raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Tad athilđeja tas Keh-
ninsch Aȧswerus/ un ẜazzija us
to Kehnininni Esteri : Kas tas
tahds/ un kur irr tas/ kas to fa-
wit Prahtā irr apnehmees ta
darriht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Tad athilđeja Esteri : Tas
Wihrs/ tas Waidneeks un Ge-
naidneeks irr tchs niknajs A-
mans. Tad iſtruhzinajabs A-
mans preckch ta Kehnixa un tahs
Kehninnes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un tas Kehninsch zehlahs
tawa Bahrsibā no Dsihrehm/ un
gahje us ta Mamma Dahrsu. Un
Amans stahweja/ un mekleja fa-
vu Dsihwibu no tahs Kehninin-
es Esteres / jo wiꞥſch redeja/
ka pahr winnu no ta Kehnixa
Launums bija nodohnahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un tas Kehninsch atgree-
sahs no ta Namuna Dahrsa us to
Dsihro Namnu / tad bija A-
nans nokrittis pee tahs Gultas/
is fo Esteres tehdeja. Tad ẜaz-
iia tas Kehninsch : Grib wiꞥſch
rri pee tahs Kehninnes War-
as Darbu darriht pee mannim
Namnu? Kad fchts Wahrs no
a Kehnixa Muttesigabje/ ats-
edse tee Amannant to Galwu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un Arbonus weens no ta
Kehnixa Raunbar Jankuxeem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tazzija: Reds/ Amanna Namunā
stahw weens Kohks peezdefinitis
Ohlektchu Augstunā/ ko Amans
darrijs irr preekſch Mardakaju/
kas labbu irr preekſch to Kehninu
runnajs. Tad ẜazzija tas Keh-
ninsch : Pakarreet winnu pee ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Tad pakahre tee Amannu
pee ta Kohka/ ko wiꞥſch Marda-
kajum bij lizzis fataiſcht. Tad
nostahjehsta Kehnixa Bahrsiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta VIII. Nodalla.
Mardakajus tohp Amana Weetā apſsiprinahts:
1. Tas israkſtihts Bauſlis prett teem Ju-
deem tohp isnihzinahts: 3. Un teem Judeem
Watta dohta/ ka tee prett faweem Eenaib-
neekeem atreebjahs: 11.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "1. Anni Deenā dewe tas
Kehninsch Aȧswerus tai
Kehnininet Esteri A-
mana to Judu Eenaidneeka
Namunu/ un Mardakajus nahze
ta Kehnixa Breekſcha/ jo Ester
eij stahſtijs/ ka tas winnat pee-
derram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Un tas Kehninsch nowilke
fawu Gredsenu/ ko wiꞥſch no A-
mana bij rehmis/ un dewe to
Mardakajum/ un Ester eezehle
Mardakaju pahr Amana Nam-
mit.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Un Ester runnaja wairak
preekſch ta Kehnixa / un kritte
preekſch winna Rahjahm seminē/
un raudaja/ un luhoſe winnu/
ka wiꞥſch atxeemtu to Launumis
Amana ta Agagitera/ un winna
Dohmas/ ko wiꞥſch prett teem
Judeem bij nodohnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Tad peekneedse tas Kehninsch
Este-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
